queries: E2E pipeline Leveraging APIs for Data Ingestion recent authoritative sources
action.query: E2E pipeline Leveraging APIs for Data Ingestion recent authoritative sources

annotations.title: Automated Data Ingestion from APIs · Pipelines · Dataloop
How to build API-driven data pipelines on AWS to unlock third-party data | AWS Public Sector Blog
End-to-End API Testing: A Complete Guide for Developers and QA Teams
Integration of E2E Testing in a CI/CD Pipeline | Keploy Blog
Strategies for Optimizing End-to-End Artificial Intelligence Pipelines on Intel Xeon Processors
Cloud API's and why they matter | E2E Networks Blog | E2E Networks

content.text:
Leveraging APIs for data ingestion is a pivotal aspect of building efficient end-to-end (E2E) data pipelines. Here are several authoritative and recent sources that delve into this topic:

1. **Automated Data Ingestion from APIs**  
   Dataloop provides a comprehensive guide on setting up data pipelines that seamlessly collect and clean data from various APIs, ensuring consistency and readiness for analysis. ([dataloop.ai](https://dataloop.ai/library/pipeline/automated_data_ingestion_from_apis/?utm_source=openai))

2. **Building an E2E Data Infrastructure**  
   ZapSight outlines the architecture of a modern data infrastructure that integrates disparate operational systems into a unified analytics environment, emphasizing the role of APIs in data ingestion. ([zapsight.com](https://zapsight.com/solutions/ai-data-engineer?utm_source=openai))

3. **How to Build API-Driven Data Pipelines on AWS to Unlock Third-Party Data**  
   AWS discusses methods for developing API-driven data pipelines using AWS services, focusing on extracting data from third-party SaaS tools via APIs. ([aws.amazon.com](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/publicsector/how-to-build-api-driven-data-pipelines-on-aws-to-unlock-third-party-data/?utm_source=openai))

4. **End-to-End API Testing: A Complete Guide for Developers and QA Teams**  
   Apidog offers a detailed guide on E2E API testing, which is crucial for ensuring the reliability of APIs used in data ingestion pipelines. ([apidog.com](https://apidog.com/blog/e2e-testing/?utm_source=openai))

5. **Integration of E2E Testing in a CI/CD Pipeline**  
   Keploy explores the integration of E2E testing within CI/CD pipelines, highlighting its importance in maintaining the integrity of APIs involved in data ingestion. ([keploy.io](https://keploy.io/blog/technology/integration-of-e2e-testing-in-a-cicd-pipeline?utm_source=openai))

6. **Pipelines | Prophecy**  
   Prophecy's documentation delves into the components of data processing workflows, including data ingestion and egress, and how APIs facilitate these processes. ([docs.prophecy.io](https://docs.prophecy.io/pipelines?utm_source=openai))

7. **Strategies for Optimizing End-to-End Artificial Intelligence Pipelines on Intel Xeon Processors**  
   This research paper discusses optimization strategies for E2E AI pipelines, including data ingestion stages, and how APIs can be leveraged for efficient data processing. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2211.00286?utm_source=openai))

8. **Cloud APIs and Why They Matter**  
   E2E Networks provides insights into the significance of cloud APIs in integrating applications and workloads, emphasizing their role in data ingestion processes. ([e2enetworks.com](https://www.e2enetworks.com/blog/cloud-apis-and-why-they-matter?utm_source=openai))

These resources offer a blend of practical guides, architectural insights, and research findings to assist in effectively leveraging APIs for data ingestion within E2E pipelines.
